message:
deps: bump arc-swap 1.7.1 -> 1.9.1

Minor bump within 1.x (additive changes only per arc-swap policy). Lockfile
was already resolved to 1.9.1 via transitive dep; aligning the workspace pin.

Verification: rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -47,7 +47,7 @@ doc_markdown = { level = "allow", priority = 1 }
 [workspace.dependencies]
 # External dependencies
 anyhow = "1.0.102"
-arc-swap = "1.7.1"
+arc-swap = "1.9.1"
 bitflags = "2.9.0"
 blake3 = "1.6.0"
 clap = { version = "4.5.0", features = ["derive"] }
